'''dhangumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyadicity|dyadicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyadicity|dyadicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhangumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængimith|dhængimith]] || [[word:dhængimij|dhængimij]] || [[word:dhængimish|dhængimish]] || [[word:dhængimi|dhængimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangungumuth|dhangungumuth]] || [[word:dhangungumuj|dhangungumuj]] || [[word:dhangungumush|dhangungumush]] || [[word:dhangungumu|dhangungumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangumuth|dhangumuth]] || [[word:dhangumuj|dhangumuj]] || [[word:dhangumush|dhangumush]] || [[word:dhangumu|dhangumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangufmuth|dhangufmuth]] || [[word:dhangufmuj|dhangufmuj]] || [[word:dhangufmush|dhangufmush]] || [[word:dhangufmuf|dhangufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangumuthu|dhangumuthu]] || [[word:dhangumuju|dhangumuju]] || [[word:dhangumushu|dhangumushu]] || [[word:dhangumuku|dhangumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangumuth|dhangumuth]] || [[word:dhangumuj|dhangumuj]] || [[word:dhangumush|dhangumush]] || [[word:dhangumu|dhangumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangumuthul|dhangumuthul]] || [[word:dhangumujul|dhangumujul]] || [[word:dhangumushul|dhangumushul]] || [[word:dhangumukul|dhangumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangumuthuthu|dhangumuthuthu]] || [[word:dhangumujuju|dhangumujuju]] || [[word:dhangumushushu|dhangumushushu]] || [[word:dhangumuku|dhangumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangumuthun|dhangumuthun]] || [[word:dhangumujun|dhangumujun]] || [[word:dhangumushun|dhangumushun]] || [[word:dhangumukun|dhangumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangumuthuoro|dhangumuthuoro]] || [[word:dhangumujuoro|dhangumujuoro]] || [[word:dhangumushuoro|dhangumushuoro]] || [[word:dhangumukuoro|dhangumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
